title: No branch picker visible in project/workspace creation
description: No branch selection or branch picker is accessible from the Projects view. The creation dialog is unreachable (F-028-001).
steps: 1. Navigate to Projects view. 2. Look for branch picker in workspace creation. 3. None found.
expected: Branch selection should be available in workspace creation flow
actual: No branch-related UI elements in creation flow; creation dialog unreachable
